name: aoa-shared-launchers
description: Installable AoA launcher candidates for bounded growth snapshots and seed-route inspection.

interface.shortDescription: Install AoA growth and seed-route launchers
interface.longDescription: Bundles two explicit launcher candidates for derived growth snapshots and Dionysus seed-route inspection while their owner-first admission audits remain pending.
defaultPrompt: Use AoA Growth Snapshot to summarize lineage, seed relevance, and one next bounded move.
Use AoA Seed Route Inspect to determine lifecycle posture, staging context, and planting constraints.
